Here is the list of signs and their scores:
1. Aries - 7/10 - Balanced, adventurous, and impulsive, Aries can sometimes struggle to make decisions and follow through on plans.
2. Taurus - 8/10 - Reliable, practical, and hardworking, Taurus often excels at achieving long-term goals with a clear plan in place.
3. Gemini - 6/10 - Quick-witted and adaptable, Geminis can be prone to distractions and may struggle to focus on one task for too long.
4. Cancer - 9/10 - Emotional and nurturing, Cancers are often excellent at building strong relationships and creating a sense of community.
5. Leo - 8/10 - Confident and charismatic, Leos often shine in leadership roles, but can be prone to arrogance if not checked.
6. Virgo - 7/10 - Analytical and detail-oriented, Virgos excel at problem-solving, but may get bogged down in details and lose sight of the bigger picture.
7. Libra - 8/10 - Diplomatic and fair-minded, Libras are often skilled mediators and peacemakers, but can be indecisive if not careful.
8. Scorpio - 9/10 - Passionate and intense, Scorpios are often driven to uncover the truth and may be overly critical of themselves or others.
9. Sagittarius - 7/10 - Adventurous and optimistic, Sagittarians can be prone to overcommitting and may struggle with follow-through.
10. Capricorn - 8/10 - Disciplined and responsible, Capricorns often excel at achieving long-term goals through hard work and perseverance.
11. Aquarius - 7/10 - Humanitarian and independent, Aquarians can be innovative problem-solvers, but may struggle to connect with others on a personal level.
12. Pisces - 8/10 - Empathetic and imaginative, Pisces are often excellent at building strong relationships and seeing the big picture, but may struggle with boundaries and reality checks.
Please note that these scores are subjective and based on general personality traits associated with each sign.
